narrative:
Gratis Township has 2,912 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.8 percentage points.
